name: Rannko
description:
‍

Source: Rannko

Features:

  • Review management across multiple platforms like Google, Yelp, and Facebook.
  • Local SEO monitoring with tracking of local search rankings.
  • Listings management to ensure consistency across online directories.
  • Competitor analysis to understand competitive online strategies.
  • Social media monitoring for engagement tracking.
  • Reporting and analytics for comprehensive performance insights.

Benefits:

  • Improved online reputation management through proactive review monitoring.
  • Enhanced local SEO performance with optimized listings and ranking tracking.
  • Efficient time management with centralized platform for multiple tasks.
  • Competitive advantage through insights into competitors' strategies.
  • Actionable data and analytics to drive informed decision-making and strategy refinement.

Pros 

  • The product is very intuitive and easy to use

Cons

  • Platform is a little clunky to work with

‍

Priced at $19 Per Month

‍
